response.justification: Maria is a strong senior individual contributor with nearly two decades of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, device orchestration tools), but the role is a people-management position requiring at least 2 years of formal people leadership and 3 years in a technical leadership role — neither of which appears on the resume. There is no evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading organizational change, and mobile-platform experience is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint. She would be a better fit for a senior/staff IC role on this team than for the manager position.
strengths: Deep developer-tools background: authored test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, and device orchestration tooling
18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong quality culture: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, plus teaching workshops and code katas
concerns: No formal people-management experience (no direct reports, hiring, or performance management)
No demonstrated technical leadership role over teams or organizational change initiatives
Limited mobile-platform depth for a role centered on a large mobile ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure expertise
No org-level leadership or roadmap ownership
